author: Fateh Muhammad Khan, Maulvi
title: Minhaj-ul-Qawaid
notes: Section headed '(Designed for Educational purposes.)'. Date given only as May 1910.

author: Ahmad Ali Khan, Munshi
title: Ta'lim-ul-Atfal
publisher: Author, who is Head Master, Hindustani School
copyright: M. Ahmad Ali Khan, Illichpur; No. 109, dated the 5th September, 1910.
notes: 8th edition, 6,000 copies — established school primer. Author in Berar (Central Provinces), printed at Lahore. [Previous edition noticed in entry No. 200 at page 34 of the catalogue for the quarter ending the 31st December, 1907.]

author: Ali Muhammad Khan, Mirza
title: Guldasta-i-Ta'lim
gloss: A book containing essays on moral subjects for the use of pupils of the Primary Department.
publisher: Author, who is Personal Assistant to Inspector-General of Education, North-West Frontier Province and Balúchistán
notes: Date given only as June 1910. Author a senior colonial education official (NWFP and Baluchistan).

title: Ilm-ul-Ta'lim
gloss: An adaptaion by Lala Bishan Das, Puri, M A, of Mr. H. T. Knowlton's work School Management for Normal Schools.
copyright: The Punjab Text-Book Committee, Lahore; No. 143, dated the 6th September, 1910.
notes: Urdu adaptation of Knowlton's School Management — same English source as the Punjabi version at p9 s32 (1910Q3); Text-Book Committee copyright.

title: Urdu ki Tisri Kitab
gloss: Third Urdu Reader for the 3rd Class in Girls' Schools, prepared by the Text-Book Revision Committee, Punjab.
copyright: The Punjab Text-Book Committee, Lahore; No. 138, dated the 6th September, 1910.

title: Urdu ki Chauthi Kitab
gloss: Fourth Urdu Reader for the 4th Class in Girls' Schools, prepared by the Text-Book Revision Committee, Punjab.
copyright: The Punjab Text-Book Committee, Lahore; No. 139, dated the 6th September, 1910.
notes: State-produced girls' school reader; companion to serial 9.
